description: vssut.ac.in is the website of Veer Surendra Sai University of Technology in Odisha, India. It publishes university information and hosts public student-facing portals such as admissions and examination results.
summary: No developer-focused integration surface was found on vssut.ac.in; only public university web portals for admissions and examination results were discoverable, with no documented APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP server, or CLI.
